indexFaq.title: Top Questions from Investors
indexFaq.a1: No. Digital Invest is a private environment for selected projects and individual conversations. There is no public crowdfunding.
indexFaq.q2: Can I invest directly on the website?
indexFaq.a2: No. This website does not accept investments or process payments. We only collect non-binding expressions of interest.
indexFaq.a3: No. All early-stage projects involve risk, including possible loss of capital. No results or returns are guaranteed.
indexFaq.q4: What happens after I submit interest?
indexFaq.a4: Our team reviews your submission and contacts you personally to share more information and discuss next steps.
indexFaq.a5: Participation depends on your jurisdiction, regulatory requirements, and the structure of each project. We discuss this individually.
indexFaq.q6: Why do you work in a private format?
indexFaq.a6: It allows us to keep communication direct, transparent, and tailored to serious long-term partners.

disclaimerSection.text: Digital Invest Inc. operates as a private multi-sector portfolio. This website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute a public offering, investment advice, or solicitation. Any potential participation is private, by invitation, and handled offline through proper legal channels. All participation is subject to due diligence and eligibility. All investments involve risk and may result in loss of capital. The actual legal status, structure, rights, and obligations are defined only in formal agreements executed offline, not by website content.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Digital Invest Inc. — Innovation across HealthTech, AI, Agriculture, and Real-Economy Systems.
about.legalFrameworkText: Digital Invest Inc. operates exclusively through private, offline contractual engagements with qualified individuals and organizations. We do not raise capital publicly, do not conduct public offerings through this website, and do not operate as a crowdfunding platform or public marketplace. All participation, if any, is discussed individually, subject to due diligence and eligibility verification, and formalized through separate legal agreements executed offline.
about.readyToLearnText: Explore our portfolio projects or request private information about potential collaboration opportunities.
about.award1Desc: Digital Invest Inc. was recognized among the Top 10 Precision Medicine Solutions Companies of 2023, highlighting leadership in genomic analytics, personalized diagnostics, and Precision Medicine 2.0 initiatives.
about.award2Desc: Digital Invest Inc.: Unleashing Healthcare Transformation with Tailored Treatment Strategies
about.expertise3: AI-driven health analytics and reasoning engines
about.vision_biomathlife: A comprehensive longevity and precision health platform integrating genomics, biochemistry, lifestyle data, and AI-driven reasoning to deliver personalized health insights and proactive preventive care.
about.vision_biomathcore: Advanced computational and biomathematical modeling services for pharmaceutical, biotech, and research organizations, enabling precision medicine development and drug discovery acceleration.
about.vision_terraaero: Intelligent drone and agricultural technology solutions for precision farming, crop monitoring, and real-economy automation in the agricultural sector.
about.vision_dishcore: A personalized nutrition and body-tracking platform combining AI-driven meal planning, metabolic insights, and food production systems for optimal wellness and longevity.
about.vision_digitalinvest: The parent company and investment services platform, managing the portfolio and facilitating private investment opportunities across all projects through a unified technological and operational backbone.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A transparent, private process for exploring potential participation in Digital Invest Inc. projects. All discussions are handled individually, by invitation, and offline.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Explore our curated portfolio of investment opportunities. Each project is owned and managed by Digital Invest Inc., ensuring quality and strategic alignment.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Found a project that interests you? Submit a non-binding request for information through our secure online form. This creates no commitment and requires no payment.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Our investment team will contact you personally to discuss the opportunity in detail. We will share comprehensive documentation, financial projections, and answer all your questions.
howItWorks.step4Desc: If both parties agree to proceed after thorough discussion, any participation is formalized offline through proper legal channels with appropriate documentation and regulatory compliance. The website plays no role in this process.
howItWorks.privatePlatformDesc: This is not a crowdfunding platform or public offering. All projects are owned and operated by Digital Invest Inc. Any potential participation is private, by invitation, and handled offline.
howItWorks.personalApproachDesc: Every potential investor receives personalized attention from our team. We believe in building long-term relationships based on trust and transparency.
howItWorks.properDocumentationDesc: Any participation, if applicable, is formalized offline through appropriate legal frameworks with full documentation and regulatory compliance, separate from this website.
howItWorks.notAdviceText: Digital Invest Inc. does not provide investment, legal, or tax advice. All information on this website is for informational purposes only.
howItWorks.notOfferText: Nothing on this website constitutes a public offering or a solicitation to buy securities. This website is informational only. Any potential participation is discussed privately, by invitation, and handled offline through proper legal channels.
howItWorks.regulatoryText: All investment opportunities are subject to applicable securities laws and regulations. Investments may only be available to accredited investors or qualified purchasers as defined by applicable law.
howItWorks.professionalGuidanceText: We strongly recommend consulting with your legal, financial, and tax advisors before making any investment decision.
howItWorks.readySubtitle: Browse our portfolio and request more information about projects that interest you. All discussions are private and non-binding.

descriptions.digital-invest-portfolio: Multi-sector portfolio spanning HealthTech, AgroTech, FoodTech, Robotics, and AI. Shared infrastructure and cross-project synergies create compounding value across 20+ innovative ventures.
descriptions.biomathlife: Precision medicine platform with 200+ health services across 20 categories. Integrates genetic analysis, biomathematical modeling, and AI diagnostics for disease prevention and longevity optimization.
descriptions.biomath-core: Foundational health operating system unifying medical records, genetics, and lifestyle into actionable insights. The data engine powering the BioMath ecosystem for precision clinical decisions.
descriptions.terraaero: Drone agricultural services across the Southern U.S. — precision monitoring, crop analytics, and resource optimization. Building U.S. drone manufacturing with a 23-state expansion roadmap.
descriptions.myday: AI-powered daily planning SaaS transforming routines into measurable behavioral patterns. Structured nutrition tracking, energy management, and micro-goal architecture backed by analytics.
descriptions.itsgoodtoday: Wellness companion built on simplicity — small daily actions in food, movement, mood, and lifestyle. No complexity, no pressure. Today is good. Tomorrow can be a little better.
descriptions.agron: National infrastructure for autonomous aerial and ground robotics — training, certification, fleet operations, and standards. The operational backbone of the U.S. robotics economy.
descriptions.luna-balance: Mindfulness platform helping women understand themselves through Silence Technology and Relationship Mode. Acceptance over pressure, translating internal sensations into human language.
descriptions.saven: Infrastructure of Continuous Execution — bridging digital understanding and physical reality. A 5-step cycle (Context, Action, Verification, Control, Support) ensuring life stays on track.
descriptions.baseline: Professional health logic made simple. A 4-step clinical launch — Biological Handshake, Baseline Ingestion, Marker Synthesis, Prognostic Launch — translating clinical noise into clarity.
descriptions.table-served: Deterministic family nutrition — scheduled meals from certified U.S. hubs every Sunday. Weekly stability boxes with Friday Lock / Sunday Pulse production cycle and diverse local cuisines.
descriptions.agron-work: Talent platform connecting employers with verified professionals in drones, robotics, AI, and automation. Direct hiring, skill certification, and workforce intelligence for the autonomy era.
descriptions.mrx-health: Medication Reactions Explorer tracking prescriptions and monitoring body effects in real time. Interactive bio-scan analysis keeps patients safe and identifies adverse interactions early.
descriptions.stresscore: Psychological state intelligence tracking stress, mood, and energy with AI micro-insights. Identifies triggers, predicts low-energy windows, and delivers timely interventions for emotional resilience.
descriptions.skincore: Camera-based AI skin analysis tracking texture, tone, and condition changes over time. Ingredient-level feedback and visual trend tracking help users understand what truly works for their skin.
descriptions.seniorcore: Support system for seniors and caregivers — monitoring wellness patterns, medication adherence, and activity levels. Real-time health insights ensuring safety, independence, and family peace of mind.
descriptions.vitalcore: Unified vital signs dashboard combining HR, HRV, sleep, stress, and activity patterns. Detects anomalies before emergencies and provides actionable alerts for proactive health management.
descriptions.bioagecore: AI-powered biological age analysis comparing chronological age to real body condition. Continuous optimization tracking and personalized interventions help users control their aging trajectory.

team.subtitle: Our leadership team combines decades of experience in biotechnology, healthcare innovation, and business development to drive the future of precision medicine.

careers.whyJoinText: We are building platforms that the world will rely on for health, food, and operations. We look for people who think in systems, not in features.
careers.work1: Small, focused teams with high responsibility.
careers.work3: Deep respect for engineering, science, and operations.
careers.work4: Remote-friendly, with emphasis on clear communication.
careers.howToApplyText: If you believe your experience aligns with our mission, send your CV, a short introduction, and links to relevant work to:

esg.title: ESG & Sustainability
esg.subtitle: Environment, Social impact, and Governance in the Digital Invest portfolio.
esg.perspectiveText: We operate at the intersection of health, agriculture, food systems, AI, and infrastructure. This naturally ties Digital Invest projects to environmental, social, and governance topics.
esg.env1: TerraAero focuses on more efficient, precise use of agricultural inputs, supporting reduced waste and better resource utilization.
esg.env2: Precision agriculture can contribute to more sustainable land use and reduced environmental impact.
esg.social1: BioMath Core and BioMath Life are designed to help individuals better understand their health and long-term risk profile.
esg.social2: We prioritize clarity, dignity, and empowerment in how people interact with their own data.
esg.governanceText: Our governance approach emphasizes long-term responsibility, security, and ethical operations. We aim to align technology with real-world human and environmental needs.

values.title: Corporate Values
values.subtitle: Our values guide every decision we make and every platform we build.

security.title: Security & Infrastructure
security.subtitle: How Digital Invest Inc. designs systems to protect data, documents, and operations.
security.byDesignText: Digital Invest Inc. designs infrastructure with security as a core requirement, not an afterthought. Our systems and processes are structured to protect confidential information, investor data, and operational intelligence.
security.principle1: Encryption in transit and at rest for sensitive data where applicable.
security.principle2: Role-based access control for internal tools and document access.
security.principle4: Secure document distribution to investors using controlled channels.
security.principle5: Regular monitoring and logging of system events.
security.dataProtectionText: Investor documents, technical briefs, and operational materials are stored in controlled environments. Access is limited to authorized team members and, where relevant, to investors or partners under agreed terms.
security.auditText: Digital Invest is exploring cryptographic integrity layers to ensure that key documents and events can be verified as untampered. This concept is described further in our
security.responsibleAIText: AI-driven components are designed for explanation, assistance, and decision support. We focus on transparency, control, and human oversight rather than opaque black-box systems.
security.limitationsText1: While Digital Invest Inc. takes security seriously and implements reasonable measures to protect data and documents, no system can be guaranteed to be completely secure.
security.limitationsText2: Cyber threats, operational risks, human error, and unforeseen vulnerabilities remain possible despite protective measures. Users, partners, and investors should take appropriate precautions and understand that residual security risks cannot be eliminated entirely.

compliance.title: Regulatory & Compliance Center
compliance.subtitle: How Digital Invest Inc. approaches regulation, risk, and responsible operations.

riskFactors.title: Risk Factors
riskFactors.subtitle: Understanding the risks associated with our projects.

governance.title: Governance
governance.subtitle: How Digital Invest Inc. structures decision-making, oversight, and responsibility.
governance.approachText: Digital Invest Inc. follows a governance framework oriented around clarity, accountability, and long-term responsibility. We operate as a focused portfolio company with clear decision lines and technical, operational, and strategic oversight.
governance.purposeText: Governance structures are designed to support disciplined operations, risk oversight, and strategic coordination. However, governance does not eliminate project risks, guarantee outcomes, or ensure success of any specific initiative.
governance.element2: Clear separation of strategic decisions and operational execution.
governance.element3: Periodic project reviews and portfolio-level assessment.
governance.element4: Risk oversight for regulatory, operational, and technology domains.
governance.advisoryText: Digital Invest engages experienced specialists in health, technology, agriculture, manufacturing, and finance to review assumptions, roadmaps, and execution plans.
governance.transparencyText: Where appropriate, we provide structured updates, project briefs, and clear status reports to aligned stakeholders and partners.

projectCommon.disclaimer: This is an informational and educational platform. It does not diagnose medical conditions, prescribe treatments, or replace professional medical advice. Consult qualified healthcare professionals for medical decisions.
projectCommon.investorDisclaimer: Submitting interest is non-binding and does not create any agreement. All potential participation is discussed individually and offline.
projectCommon.nonMedicalDisclaimer: This is an informational tool for tracking patterns. It is not a medical device and does not diagnose, treat, or prevent any condition or disease. All recommendations are for informational purposes only. Consult qualified healthcare professionals for medical advice.

projectBiomathCore.heroDesc: From sleep to cognition, from movement to mood — BioMath Core brings clarity to your health journey through intelligent real-time insights, 200+ AI-powered services, and a secure personal data vault.
projectBiomathCore.foundationTitle: Core Foundation of the BioMath Ecosystem
projectBiomathCore.foundationDesc: BioMath Core is the central technological foundation upon which all BioMath services are built. Today, the platform powers over 200 specialized AI services across 20 health categories — from Critical Health and Longevity to Mental Wellness and Biohacking. Every BioMath product in our portfolio relies on BioMath Core as its intelligent backbone.
projectBiomathCore.overviewP1: BioMath Core is an intelligent health operating system that unifies medical records, biological data, genetic information, wearable metrics, and lifestyle inputs into a single coherent platform.
projectBiomathCore.overviewP2: Unlike fragmented health apps that track isolated metrics, BioMath Core provides comprehensive analysis across 20 health categories through 200+ specialized AI services — your personal health intelligence layer.
projectBiomathCore.missionSubtitle: Three principles that guide every interaction within the platform
projectBiomathCore.mission1Desc: Convert health signals into meaning, then into gentle supportive guidance. Make complex biology accessible and actionable.
projectBiomathCore.mission2Desc: Build on emotional safety. Users are learning, never failing. Guidance is invitational rather than prescriptive.
projectBiomathCore.mission3Desc: Help users understand how their bodies respond day-to-day. Wellness-first interpretation of patterns, not medical diagnosis.
projectBiomathCore.howSubtitle: Four interconnected stages transform raw health data into daily actionable intelligence
projectBiomathCore.step1Desc: Connect wearables, upload labs, import medical records, add genetic tests. All data flows into the encrypted Model Archive vault.
projectBiomathCore.step2Desc: Server-side engine analyzes data, identifies patterns, correlates metrics across categories, and updates your personal health model continuously.
projectBiomathCore.step3Desc: 200+ specialized AI services examine sleep, nutrition, stress, recovery, cognition, metabolic health and generate personalized insights.
projectBiomathCore.step4Desc: Personalized recommendations through clean dashboards. Visual reports, smart alerts, and context-rich explanations — designed to inform, not alarm.
projectBiomathCore.blackBoxDesc: Your Model Archive — an encrypted vault storing all personal health data with military-grade security. You maintain complete control over data access, sharing, and sovereignty.
projectBiomathCore.categoriesSubtitle: 200+ specialized AI services organized across comprehensive health and wellness domains
projectBiomathCore.visionDesc: BioMath Core aims to become the foundational operating system for personal health — the layer connecting all data sources, generating unified insights, and coordinating wellness across your entire life.
projectBiomathCore.visionDesc2: Over 5-10 years: family health coordination, senior independence through predictive monitoring, smart home integration, automated medication management, and seamless healthcare provider coordination.

projectTerraAero.heroSubtitle: Precision Agriculture and Autonomous Logistics Through Advanced Drone Technology
projectTerraAero.heroDesc: TerraAero develops and operates autonomous drone systems for agricultural monitoring, precision crop management, and intelligent logistics. Combining aerospace engineering with AI-driven analytics and building towards U.S.-based drone manufacturing capabilities.
projectTerraAero.overviewP1: TerraAero combines autonomous aerospace systems with artificial intelligence to deliver scalable solutions for modern agriculture and logistics.
projectTerraAero.overviewP2: Current operations include precision crop spraying, fertilization, field analytics, irrigation monitoring, and logistics delivery across multiple states.
projectTerraAero.mission1Desc: Transform agricultural operations through autonomous drone technology that delivers precision monitoring, resource optimization, and data-driven decision support.
projectTerraAero.mission2Desc: Enable rapid, efficient delivery through autonomous drone systems that reduce transit times, operating costs, and environmental impact.
projectTerraAero.mission3Desc: Develop U.S.-based drone manufacturing infrastructure to reduce supply chain dependencies and optimize aircraft design for specific operational environments.

projectAgron.subtitle: Aerial–Ground Robotics Operations Network
projectAgron.heroDesc: A national-scale infrastructure platform for autonomous aerial and ground robotics — training, certification, operations, and standards across the United States.
projectAgron.positioning1: AGRON is not a robotics startup.
projectAgron.overviewP1: AGRON (Aerial–Ground Robotics Operations Network) is a national-scale infrastructure platform designed to support the training, certification, coordination, and real-world operation of autonomous aerial and ground robotic systems across the United States.
projectAgron.overviewP2: AGRON is not a hardware manufacturer and does not produce drones or robots. Its role is to act as the operational, educational, and regulatory interface between autonomous technologies, human operators, enterprises, and government institutions.
projectAgron.coreMissionDesc: To build a trusted national system that enables safe, scalable, and standardized deployment of autonomous aerial and ground robotic systems for commercial, governmental, and defense applications.

projectMyDay.heroDesc: MyDay transforms daily planning through AI-driven insights, habit tracking, and behavioral optimization. From structured routines to nutrition logging - making better daily decisions simple, measurable, and consistently improving.
projectMyDay.overviewP1: MyDay is an AI-powered daily planning and habit optimization platform designed to help individuals structure their day, track routines, nutrition, and behaviors, and turn everyday data into actionable insights.
projectMyDay.overviewP2: Unlike generic productivity apps or simple habit trackers, MyDay integrates structured planning, behavioral tracking, and AI-driven feedback into a single, cohesive workflow.

projectTableServed.heroDesc: Deterministic family nutrition. Scheduled meals prepared in certified US hubs, delivered every Sunday to reclaim your week. Simple. Structural.
projectTableServed.whatIsDesc: TableServed isn't a delivery app — it's a weekly stability protocol. We've replaced daily chaos with a reliable, predictable rhythm.
projectTableServed.protocolSubtitle: Four deterministic steps. No guesswork, no last-minute decisions.

projectSkinCore.heroSubtitle: AI-powered skin analysis from photos with trend tracking
projectSkinCore.overviewDesc: Skin uses camera-based AI analysis to recognize skin patterns and track visual trends over time. The platform provides recommendations with ingredient-level feedback, helping users understand what works for their skin through daily and weekly tracking without medical positioning.
projectSkinCore.feature1Desc: Camera-based pattern recognition for skin texture, tone, and condition tracking (non-medical).
projectSkinCore.feature2Desc: Monitor skin changes over days and weeks with clear before/after comparisons.
projectSkinCore.feature3Desc: Understand which ingredients work for your skin based on tracking and patterns.
projectSkinCore.feature4Desc: AI identifies correlations between products, routines, and skin condition changes.

projectStressCore.heroSubtitle: Psychological state intelligence: stress, mood, energy tracking with AI-generated micro-insights

projectVitalCore.heroSubtitle: Early warning system for vital signs, combining HR, HRV, sleep, stress, and activity patterns

projectBioAgeCore.heroSubtitle: AI-powered biological age analysis comparing chronological age to real body condition

projectSeniorCore.heroSubtitle: Support system for seniors and caregivers — wellness monitoring, medication adherence, and activity tracking

projectLunaBalance.heroSubtitle: Mindfulness platform helping women understand themselves through Silence Technology and Relationship Mode

projectItsGoodToday.heroSubtitle: Small daily actions that add up. No complexity, no pressure. Today is good.
projectItsGoodToday.heroDesc: Wellness companion built on simplicity — small daily actions in food, movement, mood, and lifestyle. No complexity, no pressure. Today is good. Tomorrow can be a little better.

projectBioMathLife.heroDesc: Precision medicine platform integrating genetic analysis, biomathematical modeling, and AI diagnostics for disease prevention and longevity optimization.

projectDigitalInvest.heroSubtitle: Building Real-World Innovation Across Technology, Health, Agriculture, and Manufacturing
projectDigitalInvest.heroDesc: Digital Invest develops and scales innovative projects across AI, precision health, advanced manufacturing, and agricultural technology — delivering measurable impact in critical sectors.

projectSaven.heroSubtitle: Infrastructure of Continuous Execution — bridging digital understanding and physical reality

projectBaseLine.heroSubtitle: Professional health logic made simple — 4-step clinical launch translating clinical noise into clarity

projectAgronWork.heroSubtitle: Talent platform connecting employers with verified professionals in drones, robotics, AI, and automation

projectMRXHealth.heroSubtitle: Medication Reactions Explorer — tracking prescriptions and monitoring body effects in real time

projectLongevityCore.heroSubtitle: Anti-aging intelligence platform with personalized longevity tracking and optimization

projectFamilyCore.heroSubtitle: Family health coordination platform — unified health profiles and monitoring for the entire household
